---
title: "Contact"
subtitle: "Let's connect"
format: html
page-layout: full
---

<style>
.contact-wrap {
  max-width: 680px;
  margin: 2rem auto;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
}
.contact-links {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.8rem;
  margin: 1.5rem 0 2rem;
}
.contact-links a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
}
.contact-links a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

.contact-form input,
.contact-form textarea {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  border: 1px solid #ccc;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 1rem;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
.contact-form textarea { height: 140px; resize: vertical; }
.contact-form button {
  background: #1a3a5c;
  color: white;
  padding: 0.7rem 2rem;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 1rem;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.contact-form button:hover { background: #22527d; }
</style>

<div class="contact-wrap">

I am open to internship opportunities, graduate roles, research collaborations, and general enquiries. Feel free to reach out through any of the channels below.

---

<div class="contact-links">
<a href="mailto:saahil.bhatt30@gmail.com">📧 saahil.bhatt30@gmail.com</a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/sahil-bhattacharya-257924228" target="_blank">💼 linkedin.com/in/sahil-bhattacharya-257924228</a>
<a href="https://github.com/saahi0206" target="_blank">🐙 github.com/saahi0206</a>
</div>

---

## Send a Message

<div class="contact-form">
<form action="https://formspree.io/f/YOUR_FORMSPREE_ID" method="POST">
  <label for="name">Your name</label>
  <input type="text" id="name" name="name" placeholder="Jane Smith" required>

  <label for="email">Your email</label>
  <input type="email" id="email" name="email" placeholder="jane@example.com" required>

  <label for="message">Message</label>
  <textarea id="message" name="message" placeholder="Write your message here..." required></textarea>

  <button type="submit">Send Message</button>
</form>
</div>

> **One step needed:** Sign up free at [formspree.io](https://formspree.io), create a form, and replace `YOUR_FORMSPREE_ID` in `contact.qmd` with your form ID. The form will then deliver messages directly to your email.

</div>
